title: 6D/5N The Best of Seoul, Gangwon & Busan Experience
details: Experience South Korea’s top destinations including Seoul, Gangwon, and Busan with a mix of cultural landmarks, scenic attractions, K-drama filming locations, and vibrant shopping streets. Enjoy highlights like Nami Island, Mt. Seorak, Gamcheon Cultural Village, and more with full-board meals and a KTX train experience.

itinerary.day_details: Departure from Manila via Philippine Airlines PR400 (00:30–05:20). Arrival in Incheon, meet tour guide, and transfer to hotel for check-in.
Visit Nami Island, Suwon Hwaseong Fortress, and Mt. Seorak with Gwongeumseong Cable Car and Shinheung Temple.
Visit Starfield Library, COEX Mall, and explore Dongdaemun and Myeongdong shopping streets.
Ride KTX train to Busan. Visit Gamcheon Cultural Village, Oryukdo Skywalk, and Nampodong Street.
Visit Hwangnidan-gil, Donggung Palace, Woljeong Bridge, Ahopsan Forest, Haedong Yonggungsa Temple, and Haeundae Blue Line Park.
Transfer to airport for flight PR463 PUS–MNL (20:44–23:45). Arrival in Manila.

inclusions: Fully loaded tours as per itinerary
Full board meals with Korean cuisine
extra_details: Mode of Payment: $200 initial down payment; $200 second down payment after one month; full payment 45 days before travel period.
